name: 18_Image_Enhancement_SRGAN_DIV2K_DL
query: Nahitaji kuunda mfumo wa kuboresha picha kwa kutumia mfano wa SRGAN (unaweza kupata SRGAN iliyofunzwa awali [hapa](https://github.com/tensorlayer/srgan)) na seti ya data ya DIV2K, ambayo inaweza kupakuliwa kutoka [kiungo hiki](https://data.vision.ee.ethz.ch/cvl/DIV2K/). Seti ya data inapaswa kupakiwa katika faili `src/data_loader.py`. Mfumo unapaswa kusindika picha, ikiwa ni pamoja na kubadilisha ukubwa na kuweka kawaida, katika `src/data_loader.py`. Tumia mfano uliyojifunza awali uliowekwa chini ya `models/saved_models/` kuokoa muda, na hifadhi picha zilizoboreshwa kwenye saraka ya `results/figures/`. Aidha, mfumo unapaswa kuonyesha na kuhifadhi kulinganisha kati ya picha za asili na zilizoboreshwa kwenye `results/figures/enhanced_comparison.png`. Hatimaye, unda ripoti ya Markdown yenye matokeo na vielelezo kwenye seti tofauti za sampuli ili kuonyesha utendaji wa mfano kwenye aina mbalimbali za picha, na ihifadhi kama `results/report.md`. Ripoti inapaswa kujumuisha kulinganisha kwa kina kwa utendaji wa mfano kwenye sampuli hizi zilizochaguliwa, ikionyesha pale ambapo mfano unafanya vizuri au unapata changamoto.

requirements.criteria: Seti ya data ya "DIV2K" imepakiwa katika faili `src/data_loader.py`.
Mfano wa "SRGAN" uliyojifunza awali umehifadhiwa chini ya `models/saved_models/`.
Usindikaji wa picha, ikiwa ni pamoja na kubadilisha ukubwa na kuweka kawaida, umetekelezwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Picha zilizoboreshwa zimehifadhiwa kwenye folda maalum `results/figures/`.
Kulinganisha kwa picha za asili na zilizoboreshwa kunaonyeshwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/enhanced_comparison.png`.
Faili ya Markdown yenye matokeo na vielelezo inazalishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/report.md`.

preferences.criteria: Seti tofauti za sampuli zinapaswa kuchaguliwa ili kuonyesha utendaji wa mfano kwenye aina mbalimbali za picha.
Ripoti ya Markdown inapaswa kujumuisha kulinganisha kwa kina kwa utendaji wa mfano kwenye sampuli hizi zilizochaguliwa, ikionyesha pale ambapo mfano unafanya vizuri au unapata changamoto.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data ya "DIV2K" imepakiwa katika faili `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file contains only a minimal placeholder/stub implementation. It does not actually load the DIV2K dataset — there is no real dataset loading logic, no download/path handling for DIV2K, no use of libraries like `torchvision`, `tensorflow_datasets`, or custom loaders that would fetch or process DIV2K data. The `load_dataset()` function simply returns a hardcoded dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}`, and the DIV2K keyword appears only in a string list (`KEYWORDS = ["DIV2K"]`) used for benchmark judging purposes, not in any functional code. This is explicitly described as a "Minimal semantic implementation for benchmark judging," confirming it does not fulfill the actual requirement.

judge_stats.criteria: Mfano wa "SRGAN" uliyojifunza awali umehifadhiwa chini ya `models/saved_models/`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The project structure shows that the `models/saved_models/` directory exists but is empty — no pretrained SRGAN model files are stored there. The only files present in the project are `src/data_loader.py` (which is a minimal placeholder with no actual SRGAN implementation) and `results/report.md` and `results/figures/enhanced_comparison.png`. There is no evidence of any saved model weights or checkpoints under `models/saved_models/`.

judge_stats.criteria: Usindikaji wa picha, ikiwa ni pamoja na kubadilisha ukubwa na kuweka kawaida, umetekelezwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file does not contain any actual implementation of image preprocessing (resizing or normalization). It only contains placeholder functions (`load_dataset()` and `build_transforms()`) that return dummy data like `{"dataset": "loaded"}` and a simple list `["rotation", "scaling", "normalization"]`. There is no real code using libraries such as `torchvision.transforms`, `PIL`, `cv2`, or `numpy` to perform actual resizing (`transforms.Resize`, `cv2.resize`, etc.) or normalization (`transforms.Normalize`, pixel scaling, etc.). The file is explicitly labeled as a "Minimal semantic implementation" placeholder, confirming that the actual preprocessing logic is absent.

judge_stats.criteria: Picha zilizoboreshwa zimehifadhiwa kwenye folda maalum `results/figures/`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: Ingawa folda `results/figures/` ipo na ina faili `enhanced_comparison.png`, hakuna ushahidi wa kutosha kwamba picha hii ilitengenezwa na mchakato halisi wa SRGAN/image enhancement. Faili `src/data_loader.py` ni "minimal semantic implementation" tu (placeholder) bila utekelezaji wa kweli wa mfano wa SRGAN, mafunzo, au uzalishaji wa picha zilizoboreshwa. Trajectory pia inathibitisha kwamba haiwezekani kuthibitisha kama picha zilizoboreshwa zimehifadhiwa kwenye folda hiyo kwa njia halisi. Kwa hivyo, kigezo hiki hakijatimizwa kwa ukamilifu.

judge_stats.criteria: Kulinganisha kwa picha za asili na zilizoboreshwa kunaonyeshwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/enhanced_comparison.png`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The file `results/figures/enhanced_comparison.png` exists in the project structure, but its content cannot be verified as a valid comparison image. The evidence shows an error when attempting to read the file: the image was specified with `image/jpeg` media type but appears to be a `image/png` image, indicating a potential corruption or format mismatch issue. Additionally, there is no trajectory evidence confirming that the image was successfully generated with actual original vs. enhanced image comparisons. The file's existence alone is insufficient to confirm the requirement is satisfied, especially given the read error encountered.

judge_stats.criteria: Faili ya Markdown yenye matokeo na vielelezo inazalishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/report.md`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The file `results/report.md` exists in the workspace, but its content is merely `('placeholder', None)` — this is not a valid Markdown report with results and visualizations. A proper report should contain meaningful analysis, metrics, and references to figures (such as `enhanced_comparison.png`). The file appears to be an unfilled placeholder rather than a genuine generated report.
